VAL-FIX-003.evidence: PipelineOrchestratorIT verifies currentStep is updated during execution (set to COMPOSER after completion, set to CRITIC on failure). PipelineOrchestratorTest verifies updateCurrentStep called for each of 5 steps. PipelineEndToEndIT E2E test verifies $.currentStep=COMPOSER in GET response after completion. All tests PASSED.
tests: should update currentStep on the pipeline run during execution
should set currentStep to failed step when execution fails
should call updateCurrentStep for each step during execution
PipelineEndToEndIT: currentStep verified as COMPOSER in GET response

VAL-FIX-004.evidence: Static analysis confirms: (1) PipelineExecutor.kt has zero adapter imports — only imports from domain/model/, domain/port/, org.slf4j, org.springframework, java.time. (2) NotificationPort interface exists in domain/port/NotificationPort.kt with notifyRunCompleted method. (3) PipelineWebhookNotifier in adapter/http/outgoing/ implements NotificationPort. (4) PipelineExecutor constructor injects NotificationPort, not PipelineWebhookNotifier.
tests: grep verification: zero adapter imports in PipelineExecutor.kt

VAL-FIX-005.evidence: PipelineOrchestratorIT verifies inputJson is non-null for all completed steps (all 5 steps) and for failed steps. PipelineOrchestratorTest verifies inputJson is non-null in both IN_PROGRESS and COMPLETED upserts, and when step fails. All 4 inputJson tests PASSED.
tests: should populate inputJson for all completed steps
should populate inputJson for failed step
should populate inputJson for all step results
should populate inputJson even when step fails
